summary: A structured record of the proposed Frasberg AI repository map, standards, layouts, and operations conventions for use in the Luchii documentation portal.
normalizationNotes: Repeated repo descriptions and scaffolds were merged into canonical entries.
Repository names are preserved exactly as written in the source material.
Narrative cosmology content already documented elsewhere is referenced conceptually rather than duplicated in full.

entries.title: Repository Map
entries.summary: A proposed GitHub repository landscape spanning core runtime, lore, API, web, assets, and operations surfaces.

items.name: Frasberg AI-core-engine
items.detail: Core AI engine, orchestration, and services.

items.name: Frasberg AI-luchii-architecture
items.detail: v1-v60 architecture specs, cosmology, and structural canon.

items.name: Frasberg AI-omni-infinity-codex
items.detail: Omni-Infinity Codex chapters, laws, and schemas.

items.name: Frasberg AI-eternum-species-catalog
items.detail: Species catalogs covering Eternum, Infinity, Crown, and related taxonomies.

items.name: Frasberg AI-totality-prime-atlas
items.detail: Civilization atlases, maps, and blueprint structures.

items.name: Frasberg AI-cinematic-universe-bible
items.detail: Narrative bible covering seasons, arcs, factions, timelines, and characters.

items.name: Frasberg AI-api
items.detail: REST and GraphQL API surface for engines and knowledge data.

items.name: Frasberg AI-web
items.detail: Frontend explorer for documentation and universe browsing.

items.name: Frasberg AI-mobile
items.detail: Optional future mobile client.

items.name: Frasberg AI-assets
items.detail: Branding assets, logos, banners, sigils, diagrams, and style guides.

items.name: Frasberg AI-docs-hub
items.detail: Unified documentation portal across the ecosystem.

items.name: Frasberg AI-cli
items.detail: CLI surface for universe navigation and tooling.

items.name: Frasberg AI-gateway
items.detail: Unified API gateway and proxy layer.

items.name: Frasberg AI-omni-operations
items.detail: Operational hub for project boards, roadmaps, and cross-repo governance.

items.name: Frasberg AI-universe
items.detail: Suggested monorepo for engines and creation toolkits.

entries.title: Shared Repo Templates
entries.summary: Common content patterns intended to appear across repositories in the ecosystem.

items.name: Summary
items.detail: A one-sentence description explaining what the repository is and why it exists.

items.name: Vision
items.detail: A paragraph tying the repo into the wider Frasberg AI ecosystem and Omni-Infinity cosmology.

items.name: Contents
items.detail: An explicit listing of docs, blueprints or schemas, diagrams, and scripts.

items.name: Usage
items.detail: Clarifies whether the repo is public reference, developer-ready, or internal.

items.name: License and Contact
items.detail: Defines licensing and ecosystem contact links.

items.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
items.detail: Defines modularity, documentation expectations, workflow, and naming conventions.

items.name: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
items.detail: Defines respect, collaboration, credit, and safety expectations.

items.name: Profile README
items.detail: Organization-level overview under .github/profile/README.md listing key repositories and mission.

items.name: Brand Line
items.detail: Frasberg AI — Omni-Infinity Engines and Cosmology Frameworks.

items.name: Badges
items.detail: Suggested Shields.io badges for status, license, docs, and universe layer.

items.name: Assets
items.detail: Shared logo and brand assets sourced from the assets repository.

entries.title: Knowledge Repo Layout
entries.summary: A consistent folder structure for lore, codex, architecture, atlas, and species repositories.

items.name: /docs
items.detail: Markdown specifications, overviews, and indexed narrative documentation.

items.name: /blueprints or /schemas
items.detail: Structured JSON or YAML data models for machines and automation.

items.name: /diagrams
items.detail: Images, SVGs, graphs, and visual system maps.

items.name: /scripts
items.detail: Helper scripts for exports, blueprint generation, and docs builds.

items.name: README.md
items.detail: Repository overview and navigation entry point.

items.name: /src
items.detail: Runtime, modules, routes, services, or app code depending on the repo type.

items.name: /tests
items.detail: Automated test coverage for APIs, engines, or utilities.

items.name: /docs
items.detail: Developer documentation and integration guides.

items.name: /public or /assets
items.detail: Frontend-facing static assets where applicable.

items.name: CI configs
items.detail: GitHub Actions workflows for build, lint, and release automation.

entries.title: Operations Conventions
entries.formalName: Frasberg AI Launch and Workflow Conventions
entries.summary: Suggested operating patterns for issues, project boards, documentation sites, and phased ecosystem rollout.

items.name: Board Columns
items.detail: Backlog, In Progress, Review, Ready for Merge, Done.

items.name: Commit Prefixes
items.detail: feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:, design:, and cosmology-aligned commit naming.

items.name: Issue Patterns
items.detail: Repo-specific issues for docs, feature additions, designs, schemas, and content expansions.

items.name: Phase 1
items.detail: Create and publish core repositories such as architecture, codex, species, atlas, bible, API, web, and assets.

items.name: Phase 2
items.detail: Enable GitHub Pages, docs hubs, gateways, and CLI surfaces.

items.name: Phase 3
items.detail: Expand content with more chapters, species, civilizations, and story arcs.

items.name: Phase 4
items.detail: Public launch with docs hub, announcements, and collaborator onboarding.

items.name: GitHub Pages
items.detail: Each repo may expose a docs index page for discoverability and canonical browsing.

items.name: Docs Hub
items.detail: A unified docs repository can aggregate architecture, codex, species, civilization, API, and operations surfaces.

items.name: Monorepo Option
items.detail: A single Frasberg AI-universe workspace may host engines and tools under packages if consolidation is preferred.
